---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill or an improvement to an existing one
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like?
A new skill, an improvement to an existing skill, or something else?

## Use case
What are you trying to accomplish? How would this help you in practice?

## Which ZoomInfo data or MCP tool does this involve?
List any ZoomInfo tools or data types this would use (e.g., technographics, intent signals, bulk enrichment, WebSights).

## Does this require a specific ZoomInfo entitlement?
Some features require add-on entitlements (Intent, WebSights, Scaling API). Note it here if you know.

## Additional context
Mockups, examples, or links to ZoomInfo documentation that would help.
